title: GetDraft
description: Callers need to load a single drafted change by name for inspection without receiving a mutable aggregate or searching the active working set. `GetDraft` is the application use case that resolves a name in `drafts/` and returns a `DraftedChangeView`.
context: Callers need to load a single drafted change by name for inspection without receiving a mutable aggregate or searching the active working set. `GetDraft` is the application use case that resolves a name in `drafts/` and returns a `DraftedChangeView`.

rules:
`GetDraft.execute` SHALL accept a `GetDraftInput` with:

- `name` (string, required) — the drafted change slug to load

The use case MUST call `ChangeRepository.getDraft(name)`.

- If a drafted change exists, the use case MUST return `{ view: DraftedChangeView }`.
- If no drafted change exists with that name, the use case MUST throw `ChangeNotFoundError`.

The use case MUST NOT fall back to `ChangeRepository.get(name)` (active storage).
`GetDraft` MUST NOT mutate persistence, append history events, or invoke `mutate` / `mutateDraft`.

constraints: This use case is for single-draft inspection. Listing all drafts remains ListDrafts.

scenarios.name: execute accepts GetDraftInput with name
then: it accepts the input without type errors

scenarios.name: execute rejects missing name at type level
then: name is a required string field

scenarios.name: execute propagates repository errors
given: ChangeRepository.getDraft throws an unexpected storage error
then: the same error propagates to the caller

scenarios.name: Drafted change returns view
given: a change exists only under drafts/ named parked-feature
then: it returns { view } where view is a DraftedChangeView

scenarios.name: Active-only name is not found
given: a change exists only under changes/ with the same slug

scenarios.name: Drafted-only name does not fall back to get
given: a change exists only under drafts/
then: AND get(name) is not used to synthesize a Change return value

scenarios.name: Discarded-only name is not found
given: a change exists only under discarded/

scenarios.name: Missing name throws
when: GetDraft.execute({ name: 'does-not-exist' }) is called and the name exists in none of changes/, drafts/, or discarded/

scenarios.name: View returned is not a mutable Change
then: view is not an instance of domain Change

scenarios.name: Uses ChangeRepository port
when: GetDraft is constructed without a ChangeRepository
then: construction fails or execute cannot run

scenarios.name: Does not require ActorResolver
then: only ChangeRepository is required in its constructor
